partialBlocker: Earlier P1D validation accepted the white-oriented product route but left black-orientation board-contract validation as the remaining acceptance gap because no P1D product flip control exists.
closureCorrection: P1D2 closed the partial result with an external temporary Vite harness that imported the real target board, annotation, PGN, token, and provider runtime and exercised black orientation through the accepted board public contract without adding a permanent product hook or control.

githubReadonlyVerification.subject: feat(annotation): 迁移 P1D 棋盘标注运行时

semantic annotation color ids for red, green, yellow, orange, purple, and dark
orientation-aware annotation arrow and square geometry using the existing P1B square transform

pointer and touch-compatible annotation gestures with board-move arbitration
duplicate arrow and square/highlight toggle removal
PGN-node annotation ownership with mainline and variation isolation
notation panel comment preservation without showing structured YCDW payloads
minimal P1D board-local annotation controls only, with complete toolbar deferred to P1E

complete annotation toolbar, panel controls, undo/redo UI, clear-all UI, splitter completion, and settings behavior
AI annotations, AI analysis, and Web Worker migration
authentication and production API product capabilities

validation.note: Knip retained existing configuration hints for chess.js and naive-ui at exit code 0.

validation.command: mise exec -- pnpm exec vite build --outDir /tmp/chess-p1d-prod-build

blackOrientationValidationMethod: Temporary Vite harness outside the repository, served from /tmp, importing real target source through Vite aliases and exercising black orientation through CanonicalChessBoard orientation props and the real BoardView overlay. Installed Google Chrome was driven through Chrome DevTools Protocol using only temporary scripts outside the repository.

externalHarnessBoundary.temporaryOrientationControl: In-memory harness-only control outside product source

blackOrientationCoordinateValidation.piecePlacement: h1 and a8 pieces appeared in the expected opposite visual corners.

blackOrientationArrowValidation.evidence: Canonical arrow gestures committed through the real overlay; arrow endpoints used square centers transformed by black orientation.

blackOrientationSquareValidation.evidence: Square outlines and filled highlights used orientation-aware square rects and canonical inset/full-square geometry.

blackOrientationNodeAssociationValidatio.evidence: Annotations disappeared when navigating to another node and restored when returning to the annotated node.

blackOrientationVariationIsolationValida.evidence: Mainline and side-variation nodes retained independent annotation models.

blackOrientationMobileLandscapeValidatio.bodyScroll: client and scroll dimensions matched; overflow hidden

blackOrientationTouchValidation.evidence: Touch-capable pointer path committed an annotation when supported.

blackOrientationCleanupValidation.evidence: Temporary preview state cleared; repeated remount left one active board ResizeObserver; no validation process or artifact remained.

productRouteOrientationStatus.reason: P1D owns annotation runtime only; user-facing orientation control is deferred to P1E complete toolbar/workspace controls.

productRouteBrowserValidation.build: temporary production Vite build outside repository
covered: legal board movement after annotation use
desktop tablet mobile portrait mobile landscape viewports
